verses.1: How the gold has become dim!
verses.3: Even the jackals offer their breast.
verses.4: The tongue of the nursing child clings to the roof of his mouth for thirst.
verses.5: Those who ate delicacies are desolate in the streets.
verses.6: For the iniquity of the daughter of my people is greater than the sin of Sodom,
verses.7: Her nobles were purer than snow.
verses.8: Their appearance is blacker than a coal.
verses.9: Those who are killed with the sword are better than those who are killed with hunger;
verses.10: The hands of the pitiful women have boiled their own children.
verses.11: The LORD has accomplished his wrath.
verses.12: The kings of the earth didn’t believe,
verses.13: It is because of the sins of her prophets
verses.14: They wander as blind men in the streets.
verses.16: The LORD’s anger has scattered them.
verses.19: Our pursuers were swifter than the eagles of the sky.
verses.21: Rejoice and be glad, daughter of Edom,
verses.22: The punishment of your iniquity is accomplished, daughter of Zion.
